extra.reason: Implemented compact iPhone one-column board flow with inline search and native detail navigation.
Tuned iPad/macOS board sizing and added macOS inspector layout.
Adaptive platform UI pass completed and builds verified.
Fixed iOS/iPadOS paired-server refresh and protected server-only boards during client saves.
Added compact iPhone board switcher menu with selected-board title.
Added isolated Go CLI and Fyne UI clients with Makefile build support.
Generated and wired shared AppIcon asset catalog for macOS, iOS, and iPadOS.
Preserved native beads hierarchy and dependency metadata across import, model persistence, server JSON, Swift clients, and Go DTOs.
Added parent selection, create-child flow, relationship navigation controls, and Kanban child link previews.
Added a cross-platform hierarchy workspace with expandable parent/child rows, relationship-aware metadata chips, row selection into bead detail, iPhone navigation, and board/hierarchy switching.
Added Mac-server-only LLM provider configuration, sanitized availability status in health and /llm/status, client status display, and Go DTO/client support without exposing API keys.
Implemented AI bead field suggestions across Swift clients, macOS server endpoint, and Go client API.
